svg.title: Token generation stages 1-4 with a detailed zoom into one pass of the loop below stage 4
svg.text: the model reads tokens, not letters.
pulled out of the generation config:
these two configure EVERY step of the loop
④ The generation loop — produce one token at a time ⚙↻
↻ append the new token, then run the whole row again
Loop continues until the model emits the EOS (end-of-text) token — or hits max_tokens.
temperature & top_p are applied at EVERY pass — the model has no plan, it re-decides each token from scratch.
↳ that's why high-temperature errors snowball: a stray token feeds the next pass, corrupting what comes after.
(a) the whole vocabulary — all ~100k+ tokens, always scored at every temperature
the funnel keeps words by a running TOTAL — keep until Σ ≥ top_p; the word that crosses it is KEPT.
Σ: 32 → 58 → 75 → 86 → 94 ✓ stop · white kept, off-context dropped
(d) how many words survive the funnel (each number = words kept)
one random draw picks ONE token → "cheese"
⑤ Detokenize — join the emitted tokens back into text
